languages.text: "По крайней мере, взять под стражу Камиллу Драйвстем моей власти хватило. Хотя совет этой прожженной в интригах старухи мог бы нам пригодиться."{n}Что-то в лице Ларии меняется: новая мысль явно пришлась ей по вкусу.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "По крайней мере, взять под стражу Камиллу Драйвстем моей власти хватило. Хотя совет этой прожженной в интригах старухи мог бы нам пригодиться."{n}Что-то в лице Ларии меняется: новая мысль явно пришлась ей по вкусу.{/n}

languages.text: "At least I had the authority to arrest Camilla Drivestem. Though we could do with that old schemer's advice just about now."{n}Something changes in Laria's face: she clearly likes this new idea.{/n}

"At least I had the authority to arrest Camilla Drivestem. Though we could do with that old schemer's advice just about now."{n}Something changes in Laria's face: she clearly likes this new idea.{/n}

languages.text: “至少，我有权逮捕卡米拉·德莱夫斯塔。不过眼下我们倒正需要那个老狐狸的建议。”{n}菈丽雅的神情微微一变，她显然很中意这个新冒出来的念头。{/n}
languages.original_text: "At least I had the authority to arrest Camilla Drivestem. Though we could do with that old schemer's advice just about now."{n}Something changes in Laria's face: she clearly likes this new idea.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “至少，我有权逮捕卡米拉·德莱夫斯塔。不过眼下我们倒正需要那个老狐狸的建议。”{n}菈丽雅的神情微微一变，她显然很中意这个新冒出来的念头。{/n}

languages.text: « Heureusement, je détiens au moins l'autorité nécessaire pour avoir mis Camilla Drivestem aux arrêts. Encore que, nous aurions bien besoin des conseils de cette vieille intrigante, à l'heure actuelle. » {n}Quelque chose change dans son expression : de toute évidence, cette nouvelle idée la séduit.{/n}
languages.original_text: "At least I had the authority to arrest Camilla Drivestem. Though we could do with that old schemer's advice just about now."{n}Something changes in Laria's face: she clearly likes this new idea.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Heureusement, je détiens au moins l'autorité nécessaire pour avoir mis Camilla Drivestem aux arrêts. Encore que, nous aurions bien besoin des conseils de cette vieille intrigante, à l'heure actuelle. » {n}Quelque chose change dans son expression : de toute évidence, cette nouvelle idée la séduit.{/n}

languages.text: "En azından Camilla Drivestem'i tutuklama yetkim vardı. Gerçi şu an o yaşlı entrikacının tavsiyesini almak epey işimize gelirdi." {n}Laria'nın yüzünde bir değişiklik yaşanıyor. Aklına gelen bu fikri oldukça beğenmiş görünüyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "At least I had the authority to arrest Camilla Drivestem. Though we could do with that old schemer's advice just about now."{n}Something changes in Laria's face: she clearly likes this new idea.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "En azından Camilla Drivestem'i tutuklama yetkim vardı. Gerçi şu an o yaşlı entrikacının tavsiyesini almak epey işimize gelirdi." {n}Laria'nın yüzünde bir değişiklik yaşanıyor. Aklına gelen bu fikri oldukça beğenmiş görünüyor.{/n}

languages.text: «Al menos tenía suficiente autoridad para arrestar a Camilla Drivestem. Aunque podríamos aprovechar el consejo de esa vieja maquinadora». {n}Algo cambia en la expresión de Laria: le ha gustado esta nueva idea.{/n}
languages.original_text: "At least I had the authority to arrest Camilla Drivestem. Though we could do with that old schemer's advice just about now."{n}Something changes in Laria's face: she clearly likes this new idea.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Al menos tenía suficiente autoridad para arrestar a Camilla Drivestem. Aunque podríamos aprovechar el consejo de esa vieja maquinadora». {n}Algo cambia en la expresión de Laria: le ha gustado esta nueva idea.{/n}

languages.text: "Ich hatte immerhin die Autorität, Camilla Drivestem zu verhaften. Wobei wir den Rat der alten Intrigantin jetzt gut gebrauchen könnten."{n}Etwas verändert sich in Larias Gesicht. Diese neue Idee scheint ihr zu gefallen.{/n}
languages.original_text: "At least I had the authority to arrest Camilla Drivestem. Though we could do with that old schemer's advice just about now."{n}Something changes in Laria's face: she clearly likes this new idea.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Ich hatte immerhin die Autorität, Camilla Drivestem zu verhaften. Wobei wir den Rat der alten Intrigantin jetzt gut gebrauchen könnten."{n}Etwas verändert sich in Larias Gesicht. Diese neue Idee scheint ihr zu gefallen.{/n}

languages.text: 「少なくとも、私はカミラ・ドライブスチームを逮捕する権限は持っていた。でも、あの老獪な策士の助言は、今まさに必要だろう。」{n}リアラの顔に変化が訪れる。この新しいアイデアは、彼女に好印象を与えているようだ。{/n}
languages.original_text: "At least I had the authority to arrest Camilla Drivestem. Though we could do with that old schemer's advice just about now."{n}Something changes in Laria's face: she clearly likes this new idea.{/n}
